info.name: Same Day Solution — Payout Partner API
info.description:
Bank payout (IMPS/NEFT) for B2B partners — powered by **Same Day Solution Pvt. Ltd.** and SparkUpTech Express Pay.

Use this collection to move money from a **merchant’s wallet** to a **vendor’s bank account**. Pass **`merchant_id`** — the Same Day **merchant identifier** (our internal `retailers.partner_id`) whose balance is debited. Your platform is the **API partner**; **`merchant_id`** is **which merchant** you are paying on behalf of.

**Legacy:** the field `retailer_id` is accepted as an alias for `merchant_id` (same value).

## Authentication
Every authenticated request requires 3 headers:
- `x-api-key` — Your public API key
- `x-signature` — HMAC-SHA256 signature
- `x-timestamp` — Current Unix timestamp (ms)

Signature formula:
```
HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, JSON.stringify(body) + timestamp)
```
For GET requests (no body): `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, '' + timestamp)`

## Setup
1. Set `api_key`, `api_secret`, and `merchant_id` in Collection Variables
2. Pre-request scripts auto-generate the signature
3. Run **List My Merchants** first to discover valid `merchant_id` values\n4. Set `merchant_id` to one of the returned values\n5. Run **Get Bank List** → **Verify Bank Account** → **Initiate Transfer** → **Get Transfer Status**

## Security
- IP whitelisting enforced (contact admin to whitelist your server IP)
- Timestamp tolerance: 5 minutes
- HTTPS required in production
- API key permission required: `payout` or `all`\n- Merchant scoping: each partner can only use merchant_ids linked to their account by admin

## ⚠️ Postman Cloud Agent
If you see **"IP address not authorized"** even though your IP is whitelisted, the request may be going through Postman’s cloud servers.

**Fix:** Postman **Settings → General** → turn **OFF** **"Send requests through Postman's cloud agent"** (or use the Postman desktop agent) so requests use your real IP.

## Capabilities
- List linked merchants (discover valid merchant_id values for your account)\n- Bank list (IMPS/NEFT filters)
- Verify bank account (beneficiary name; no penny drop charge)
- Initiate transfer (debits the chosen merchant wallet: amount + charges)
- Poll status by `transactionId` or `clientRefId`, or list last 20 payouts for a merchant

## Duplicate prevention
A second transfer to the **same account number** for the same **`merchant_id`** within **2 minutes** while a prior attempt is still pending/processing/success returns **429** with `wait_seconds` (remaining time in that window).

variable.description: Same Day merchant id (retailers.partner_id) — wallet debited for each transfer.
Internal payout row UUID. Initiate Transfer (test) saves this on 200; replace manually if needed.

item.name: 🔐 Payout — Authenticated
item.description:
All requests require `x-api-key`, `x-signature`, and `x-timestamp` headers.

The pre-request script automatically calculates the HMAC signature.

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
pm.test('Has merchants', function() { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; pm.expect(j.merchants).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description:
Returns the list of merchants (retailers) linked to your partner account by admin.

Use the `merchant_id` from this response in **Initiate Transfer** and **List Recent Transfers**.

If this returns an empty list, contact Same Day admin to link your merchants.

**Tip:** The test script auto-sets `merchant_id` to the first merchant in the response.

response.name: 200 — Merchants
200 — No Merchants Linked

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
pm.test('Has banks', function() { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; pm.expect(j.banks).to.be.an('array'); });

query.description: Search by bank name or IFSC

request.description:
Returns list of banks for payout. Use `bankId` and `bankName` in Verify and Transfer.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `imps` | Boolean | IMPS-enabled banks only |
| `neft` | Boolean | NEFT-enabled banks only |
| `popular` | Boolean | Popular banks only |
| `search` | String | Search by bank name |

response.name: 200 — Banks
401 — Unauthorized (IP Blocked)

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }

request.description:
Verify bank account and get beneficiary name. Penniless transaction (no charges).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `accountNumber` | String | ✅ Yes | Bank account number |
| `ifscCode` | String | ✅ Yes | IFSC code |
| `bankName` | String | No | Bank name |
| `bankId` | Number | No | Bank ID from bank list |

response.name: 200 — Verified
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "is_valid": true,
  "account_holder_name": "John Doe",
  "bank_name": "HDFC Bank",
  "branch_name": "Mumbai Main",
  "verification_charges": 0,
  "message": "Account verified successfully",
  "reference_id": "REF123456"
}

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
const mid = body.merchant_id != null ? String(body.merchant_id).trim() : (body.retailer_id != null ? String(body.retailer_id).trim() : '');
if (!mid || mid === 'YOUR_MERCHANT_ID') { throw new Error('Set merchant_id in Collection Variables (Same Day merchant id whose wallet is debited).'); }
pm.test('Response is JSON with success field', function() { pm.response.to.be.json; const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description:
Initiate IMPS or NEFT transfer. Debits the merchant’s wallet (amount + charges).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `merchant_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Same Day merchant id (`retailers.partner_id`) — wallet debited. Must be linked to your partner account (see **List My Merchants**). **Legacy alias:** `retailer_id` |
| `accountNumber` | String | ✅ Yes | Beneficiary account number |
| `ifscCode` | String | ✅ Yes | IFSC code |
| `accountHolderName` | String | ✅ Yes | Beneficiary name |
| `amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | Amount in rupees |
| `transferMode` | String | ✅ Yes | `IMPS` or `NEFT` |
| `bankId` | Number | ✅ Yes | Bank ID from bank list |
| `bankName` | String | ✅ Yes | Bank name |
| `beneficiaryMobile` | String | ✅ Yes | 10-digit mobile (6-9 start) |
| `senderName` | String | ✅ Yes | Sender name |
| `senderMobile` | String | ✅ Yes | 10-digit mobile (6-9 start) |
| `senderEmail` | String | No | Sender email |
| `remarks` | String | No | Transfer remarks |

### Duplicate Prevention
Same account within 2 minutes returns 429. Wait before retrying.

### On Failure
Wallet is automatically refunded.

response.name: 429 — Duplicate Prevention

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }

query.description: Internal row UUID (auto-set after successful Initiate Transfer)
Client reference ID from transfer (enable and disable transactionId to use this)

request.description:
Check status of a single payout transfer.

For pending/processing transactions, the API auto-checks with the provider and updates status.
Failed transactions are auto-refunded.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `transactionId` | String | Conditional | Our internal transaction UUID |
| `clientRefId` | String | Conditional | Client ref ID from transfer |

At least one of `transactionId` or `clientRefId` is required.

**Tip:** After a successful **Initiate Transfer**, `last_payout_transaction_id` is saved for this request. You can also paste a UUID or use `clientRefId` instead (enable that query param and disable `transactionId`).

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey.trim() === '' || apiKey === placeholderKey) { throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret.trim() === '' || apiSecret === placeholderSecret) { throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables (or Environment).'); }
if (!mid || mid === 'YOUR_MERCHANT_ID') { throw new Error('Set merchant_id in Collection Variables (Same Day merchant id).'); }

request.description:
Get list of recent payout transactions for a merchant (last 20).

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `list` | Boolean | ✅ Yes | Must be `true` |
| `merchant_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Same Day merchant id (**legacy:** `retailer_id`) |
